chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (60/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (60/ 5)
text: اللَّهِ تَعَالَى سَأَلَ سائِلٌ بِعَذابٍ واقِعٍ. لِلْكافِرينَ بِوَلَايَةِ عَلِيٍّ لَيْسَ لَهُ دافِعٌ ثُمَّ قَالَ هَكَذَا وَ اللَّهِ نَزَلَ بِهَا جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Suleyman, from his father, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj the Exalted [70:1] A questioner, asked for the Punishment to befall [70:2] For the unbelievers in the Wilayah of Aliasws, there is none to avert it’. Then heasws said: ‘This is how, by Allahazwj Jibraeelas descended with it unto Muhammadsaww’.
en.sarwar: 47. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Sayf from his brother from his father from abu Hamza from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) about the words of Allah, the Most High. “. . your ideas are confused [51:8]. Let whoever wishes, turn away from it (Wilaya, Leadership with Divine Authority) (Our Quran).” [51:9] The Imam (a.s.) said, “whoever would turn away from Wilaya, (Leadership with Divine Authority) he has turned away from paradise.”
